visual: Wide side-facing bow stance with one arm extended out to the side palm-up and the other hand resting at the waist — Chen-style's signature open posture.
motion_description: The sequence begins with the weight shifting fully to the left leg while the right foot steps sideways into a wide stance. The right arm then sweeps downward across the chest and extends outward to the right side at shoulder level, as the left arm simultaneously draws back to rest firmly on the left waist. Concurrently, the torso rotates to face forward while the head turns right to gaze along the extended right arm, with the body weight settling evenly between both legs. The movement flows steadily and continuously before arriving at a deliberate pause in the final broad posture.
